expectedIssues: Casino icon design/layout is broken in the bottom nav bar
reportedIssues: The fixed bottom navigation bar overlaps the game grid, cutting off the lower row of tiles and making parts of the content hard to view or tap.
Several horizontally arranged items are clipped at the right edge of the screen, including category chips and game tiles, leaving partially visible cards.

expected.reasoning: Expected issue is about casino icon design/layout in bottom nav bar; reported issues describe content overlap/clipping but don't specifically mention the casino icon itself being broken.
